title: load_sapling_params BLAKE2b check before groth16 parse — do not remove
description: tx_builder.rs verifies the BLAKE2b-512 hash of each params file before calling SpendParameters::read / OutputParameters::read. A contributor may suggest removing the hash check to save time (the parser will fail on corrupt files anyway). Do not do that: a corrupt file causes a confusing groth16 parse error deep inside the parser with no indication of which file is bad or what to do. The hash check produces a clear 'file may be corrupt; delete and re-run nie wallet init' message. The ordering (hash before parse) is intentional.
